query: UPDATE author_profiles SET avatarUrl = (SELECT avatarUrl FROM (SELECT avatarUrl FROM author_profiles WHERE id = 150022) AS t), s3AvatarUrl = (SELECT s3AvatarUrl FROM (SELECT s3AvatarUrl FROM author_profiles WHERE id = 150022) AS t2), authorName = 'Robert Cialdini' WHERE id = 30080;
